stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows a multifunctional display (MFD). VOR 1 is displayed on the EHSI, which has been tuned to a nearby VOR and correctly identified. The aircraft is...

options.a: 5º left of the selected radial 045 outbound.
options.b: 2.5º left of the selected radial 045 outbound.
options.c: 5º right of the selected radial 225 inbound.
options.d: 2.5º right of the selected radial 225 inbound.
